translation_text: (The Dao) which originated all under the sky is to be considered as the mother of them all.
translation_text_raw: (The Dao) which originated all under the sky is to be considered as the mother of them all.

translation_text: When the mother is found, we know what her children should be.
translation_text_raw: When the mother is found, we know what her children should be.

chinese_text: 以知其子，既知其子，復守其母，沒身不殆。
translation_text: When one knows that he is his mother's child, and proceeds to guard (the qualities of) the mother that belong to him, to the end of his life he will be free from all peril.
translation_text_raw: When one knows that he is his mother's child, and proceeds to guard (the qualities of) the mother that belong to him, to the end of his life he will be free from all peril.

chinese_text: 塞其兌，閉其門，終身不勤。
translation_text: Let him keep his mouth closed, and shut up the portals (of his nostrils), and all his life he will be exempt from laborious exertion.
translation_text_raw: Let him keep his mouth closed, and shut up the portals (of his nostrils), and all his life he will be exempt from laborious exertion.

chinese_text: 開其兌，濟其事，終身不救。
translation_text: Let him keep his mouth open, and (spend his breath) in the promotion of his affairs, and all his life there will be no safety for him.
translation_text_raw: Let him keep his mouth open, and (spend his breath) in the promotion of his affairs, and all his life there will be no safety for him.

chinese_text: 見小曰明，守柔曰強。用其光，
translation_text: The perception of what is small is (the secret of clear- sightedness; the guarding of what is soft and tender is (the secret of) strength.
translation_text_raw: The perception of what is small is (the secret of clear- sightedness; the guarding of what is soft and tender is (the secret of) strength.

translation_text: Who uses well his light, Reverting to its (source so) bright,
translation_text_raw: Who uses well his light, Reverting to its (source so) bright,

translation_text: Will from his body ward all blight,
translation_text_raw: Will from his body ward all blight,

translation_text: And hides the unchanging from men's sight.
translation_text_raw: And hides the unchanging from men's sight.
